FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Settlement Cost Change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes settlement costs to be primarily based on distance, and adds resource costs as well.

patchNoteLines.li: Settlement costs are based on distance instead of number of settlements in the empire
After founding a configurable number of settlements (default 3), further settlements require resources in addition to silver

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Performance Improvement
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Improves performance of the new distance-based settlement cost calculations.

patchNoteLines.li: Uses caching to cut down on pathfinding checks

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Update create new settlement UI
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Some updates to the complex-mode create new settlement UI.

patchNoteLines.li: Updates the additional complex-mode-only window in the create new settlement UI

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Distance fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: If there are no Empire settlements, then the distance calculations fall back onto one of the player's active maps.

patchNoteLines.li: Uses player's map for distance-based calculations if no Empire settlements exist

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route drawing fix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Small change to world-map route drawing.

patchNoteLines.li: Routes between settlements on different planet layers are no longer drawn
Bugfix: routes between settlements in orbit were drawn on the planet's surface instead

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Slider Bugfix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Fixes an issue where settlement sliders at max could produce constant ticking noises.

patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: settlement sliders set to max can produce constant drag-sliding noises

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route Rendering Fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: A few fixes for routes between orbital settlements.

patchNoteLines.li: Makes orbital routes a little brighter and thicker
Orbital routes will only render when the orbital layer does

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route rendering change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Minor change to route rendering on the world map.

patchNoteLines.li: Always draw selected routes and labels when the route's associated layer is being rendered

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Production UI Fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: A couple fixes to be stricter with floating-point rounding, in the hopes of quashing a slider ticking bug.

patchNoteLines.li: Round values going into and out of Widgets.HorizontalSlider calls

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Settlement founding changes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds a couple of minor features to ease the difficulty spike of needing resources to found settlements after the grace threshold.

patchNoteLines.li: Once the player has passed the threshold where further settlements require resources to found, they will receive a letter stating as such
There is now a mod setting to scale the resource cost of founding a settlement
You can now spend silver to fill a resource stockpile

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Minor fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Backend code update, no functional changes.

patchNoteLines.li: Centralizes a handful of functions into a new FormulaUtil class

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Resource allocation changes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes the allocation checks during loading to be less strict; if an allocation would be greater than current production, then instead of evicting the allocation entirely, we just clamp it to the current production.

patchNoteLines.li: Changes ReRegisterAllocations to be less strict with evicting allocations

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Auto-max allocations
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds ability to set a settlement's resource to automatically allocate all production to stockpiling.

patchNoteLines.li: Adds ability to set a settlement's resource to automatically allocate all production to stockpiling

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Techlevel-variable needs
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds the ability to vary a need's resource by techlevel, and converts the "building materials" need to use this system

patchNoteLines.li: Adds the ability to vary a need's resource by techlevel
The Building Materials need now requires both logging and mining, the exact distribution depending on tech level

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Founding Cost Rework
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Rework how founding costs are implemented to make it easier for child defs to declare their own costs.

patchNoteLines.li: Remove the FoundingCostExtension and adds a foundingResourceCosts field to SCSettlementTypeExtension

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: UI Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the resource need companion window in the Found New Settlement screen to take into account the new tile modifier companion window from the base mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Shifts the horizontal position of the resource need companion window based on whether the base mod's tile modifier companion window is open

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: UI Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update to use the ScrollUtil scrollbars from the base mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Update to use ScrollUtil scrollviews from the base mod

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Backend Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Some backend code updates for maintainability.

patchNoteLines.li: Some backend code updates
